description:
Pixverse v4.5 is a video generation model capable of generating high quality videos in under a minute. 

Note:
Send 1 image to perform an image-to-video task or a video effect generation task, and 2 images to perform a video transition task, using the first image as the first frame and the second image as the last frame. 

Optional parameters:
Negative prompt to set the negative prompt. 
Duration to set the video duration (5 or 8 seconds). 
Set the resolution (360p,540p,720p or 1080p). 
Effect to set the video generation effect, provided 1 image is given (Options: `Kiss_Me_AI`, `Kiss`, `Muscle_Surge`, `Warmth_of_Jesus`, `Anything,_Robot`, `The_Tiger_Touch`, `Hug`, `Holy_Wings`, `Hulk`, `Venom`, `Microwave`). Use `--style` to set the video generation style (for text-to-video,image-to-video, and transition only, options: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`).  
Seed to set the seed and Aspect ratio to set the aspect ratio (16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16).
